# Testdata Directory

This directory stores BPX test fixtures.

- `golden/<engine>/parse/`: `.uasset` / `.umap` fixtures for parse and round-trip validation (for example `golden/ue5.7/parse/`)
- `golden/<engine>/operations/`: operation-equivalence fixtures (`before`/`after` pairs + `operation.json`)
- `golden/<engine>/expected_output/`: expected CLI output files for field-accuracy checks (`oracle: "ue-fixture"` required)
- `synthetic/`: malformed/boundary fixtures regenerated by `gen_synthetic.go`
- `manifest.json`: fixture manifest used for hash verification
- `fuzz/`: fuzz seeds and crashers
- `reports/`: analysis output directory (not tracked by git)
- `BPXFixtureGenerator/`: source-of-truth UE plugin, synced into the Lyra sample project plugin directory
- Local fixture-generation paths can be stored in `scripts/local-fixtures.config.json` (copy from `scripts/local-fixtures.config.example.json`; local file is gitignored). Multi-engine profiles are supported via `engines`, and fixture scripts run all configured profiles together (parallel when multiple profiles are present).

## `expected_output` Update Rules

- Default output destination of `scripts/gen_expected_output` is `testdata/reports/generated_expected_output/<engine>/` when `--golden-root` points at `testdata/golden/`.
- Use `--allow-golden-overwrite` only when intentionally writing into `testdata/golden/<engine>/expected_output/`.
- Keep `oracle: "ue-fixture"` in `golden/<engine>/expected_output/*.json` and only commit UE-validated fixtures.
